name: RC Pilot Trainer
summary:
Experience the thrill of R/C airplane flying! 
This demo puts you in control of a highly realistic airplane in a beautifully rendered environment, recreating the precision and excitement of line-of-sight flying. Perfect for beginners and seasoned pilots alike, this VR experience offers a unique way to enjoy R/C flight—rain or shine.

Seasoned pilots can use it to keep their skills sharp when the weather isn’t ideal, while newcomers will find it an accessible way to practice fundamental maneuvers. With...
